labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 712130 ($2,102,563,624) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 712130 ($5,606,441,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1664 (margins.json[71]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Recreation EBITDA/Sales 16.64%); revenue/employee $143,740 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 712130); class <5: 309 firms, avg revenue/firm $351,984 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $58,570 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 98 firms, avg revenue/firm $836,663 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $139,221 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 106 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,532,670 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $255,036 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 173 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,583,289 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $929,059 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 89 firms, avg revenue/firm $32,381,674 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $5,388,311 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 17 firms, avg revenue/firm $82,667,294 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $13,755,838 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 89
